params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste (kitchen). Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, matte countertops, open shelving with curated ceramics, under-cabinet lighting. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A warm, restrained Japandi scheme that balances Scandinavian lightness with Japanese restraint: soft warm neutrals, light oak, sculpted simple forms, and layered natural textures. Prioritize low, grounded furniture, a focused family work corner, and meditative vignette corners for tea/reading. Maintain uncluttered composition and honest, visible light sources. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
